name: ONYXEQUITIES.COM
message: [AI generated] Onyx Equities, LLC is a private real estate investment, management, and development firm. Based in Woodbridge, New Jersey, it operates throughout the U.S, focusing mainly on the Tri-State and Mid-Atlantic regions. Since its foundation in 2004, Onyx Equities acquires and transforms commercial properties into modern, technologically advanced workplaces. It provides third-party services including leasing, asset management, property management, and construction supervision.
